summary: Frontend testing for TeacherHubPro PDF Export - ALL REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED AND PASSED. Page 1 (Weekly Plan) contains all 4 rows (Day Theme, DOK Levels, Activities 9, Materials 7 including 'Otros'). Page 2 (Standards) has two columns side by side. Print preview shows exactly 2 pages total.
critical_code_review_comments: PlanPrintView.js correctly implements compact layout with flexbox and overflow:hidden
Page 1 contains all 4 rows: Day Theme, DOK Levels (4 levels with short descriptions), Activities (9 items), Materials (7 items including 'Otros')
Page 2 Standards uses display:flex with gap:20px for two-column layout - confirmed side by side
Total page count is exactly 2 as required
No content overflow detected between pages
seed_data_creation: Used existing plan 'Unit 3 - The Big Adventure' (plan_bc34a47a) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro PDF export feature is FULLY WORKING. All user requirements verified: 1) Page 1 fits ALL content without overflow (Day Theme, DOK Levels 4, Activities 9, Materials 7 including 'Otros'), 2) Content starts at top with no excessive white space, 3) Page 2 has two-column Standards layout (First Week / Second Week side by side), 4) Print preview shows exactly 2 pages, 5) No content overlapping between pages.

requirement_1_page1_content_starts_at_to.details: Header starts immediately at top with school name and title, no excessive white space

details.dok_levels_row: 4 levels with descriptions (Lv1: Memory, Lv2: Processing, Lv3: Strategic, Lv4: Extended)
details.activities_row: 9/9 activities visible (Lluvia de ideas, Conocimiento previo, Vocabulario, Leer páginas, Lectura guiada/coral, Preguntas orales, Preguntas comprensión, Práctica ejercicio, Otro)
details.materials_row: 7/7 materials visible (Libro, Cuaderno, Guía del Maestro, Prueba examen, Diccionario, Hojas de trabajo, Otros)

requirement_3_materials_shows_otros.details: Materials row shows ALL 7 items including 'Otros' as the last item

requirement_5_no_content_overlap.details: No content overlapping between pages - each page has overflow:hidden

verification_method: Playwright browser automation with JavaScript evaluation to verify DOM structure and content
